calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Against Defendants
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Against Defendants is GRANTED. Notice of non-opposition filed by Defendant Concepcion Silva; judgment previously entered against Defendant Jose Antonio Escolero Bonilla dba La Oficina; no opposition filed by any other defendant.

The Court signed the proposed order submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Hearing On Plaintiff Crusader Insurance Company S Motion For Separate Judgment Against Defaulted Defendant Jose Antonio Escolero Bonilla Dba La Oficina
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted on PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Separate Judgment Against Defaulted Defendant Jose Antonio Escolero Bonilla Dba La Oficina as follows:

Plaintiff Crusader Insurance Company's motion for separate judgment against defaulted defendant Jose Antonio Escolero Bonilla dba La Oficina is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Plaintiff's counsel to submit a proposed order and the court will sign the proposed default judgment included with the moving papers.
